detail.description:
Move around the arena, draw a trail to grow your territory, and claim the zone before someone cuts you off. Simple rules, endless fun!

Fair warning: this game is seriously hard to put down!

What makes Paper.io 2 so fun:
∙ Smooth, satisfying arcade gameplay that just feels right
∙ Online multiplayer you can jump into in seconds
∙ 100+ unique skins to collect
∙ Free rewards every day
∙ Quick matches that fit into any break
∙ A secret surprise if you manage to capture the entire map
detail.recentChanges:
MAJOR UPDATE
∙ Visuals: a new zone creation visual effect has been added
∙ Skins: 8 new hero outfits have been introduced
∙ Performance improvements & bug fixes
Jump in the arena now!
